legend:
  ^  Central claim: Sparse attention correlates with better retrieval.
  ii Sampling: Stratified subset of LLM checkpoints.
  ii Probes: Layer-wise linear probes.
  ii Stats: Mixed-effects regression.
  ii Replication: Cross-seed re-run protocol.
  ii Validation: Held-out evaluation set.
  _  Data: Activation logs from open-weights checkpoints.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── built with _ii^ ──
